AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class AnnotationConfigurationService

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Provides load/save operations for the annotation configuration XML using XmlSerializer.

public static class AnnotationConfigurationService
Inheritance
object
AnnotationConfigurationService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

This service reads and writes AnnotationConfigurationData to an XML file on disk. The XML is formatted with indentation and UTF-8 encoding without a BOM to produce stable, source-control-friendly output.

The save operation writes directly to the destination path (not via a temporary file). Callers should ensure the file is not concurrently accessed in a way that could cause partial writes.

Methods

Load(string)

Loads an annotation configuration XML file from disk.

public static AnnotationConfigurationData Load(string filePath)

Parameters

filePath string

Path to the configuration XML file.

Returns

AnnotationConfigurationData

The deserialized AnnotationConfigurationData instance.

Remarks

If deserialization returns null, a new AnnotationConfigurationData instance is returned.

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown when filePath is null/empty/whitespace.

FileNotFoundException

Thrown when the file does not exist.

Save(string, AnnotationConfigurationData)

Saves an annotation configuration to disk using XmlSerializer.

public static void Save(string filePath, AnnotationConfigurationData data)

Parameters

filePath string

Destination XML file path.

data AnnotationConfigurationData

Configuration data to serialize.

Remarks

Ensures the destination directory exists before writing.

The serialized XML includes the xsd and xsi namespace prefixes and uses:

  • Indented formatting with two spaces.
  • UTF-8 encoding without a BOM.
  • Platform newline normalization via Replace.

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown when filePath is null/empty/whitespace.

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when data is null.
